title: Event title
tone_notes: 1-3 short notes about mood and voice

INITIAL.description: Event intro text with STS2-style inline markup such as [gold][/gold], [jitter][/jitter], [sine][/sine], [rainbow ...][/rainbow].

OPTION_A.title: Option title
OPTION_A.description: Mechanical summary text with dynamic vars like {Gold}, {Heal}, {Damage}.

OPTION_A_RESULT.description: Follow-up paragraph after choosing option A.

OPTION_B_RESULT.description: Follow-up paragraph after choosing option B.
